name: 6 Feet Pillar Block Cutter Machine
description: A robust, high-precision pillar-type block cutting machine designed for cutting granite, marble, and sandstone blocks. The heavy-duty cast iron pillars ensure maximum stability and zero vibration during high-speed cutting operations.
features: Heavy-duty oil-bathed guide pillars for smooth vertical movement
Automatic water-feeding system to keep the blade cool and suppress dust
Microprocessor-controlled automatic slab thickness indexing
Highly durable cast iron frame structure for longevity

name: 7 Feet Pillar Block Cutter Machine
description: An intermediate, high-performance stone block cutter featuring a reinforced dual-pillar design and a 25 HP main motor. It is perfectly optimized for mid-to-large sized processing units seeking high output with lower power consumption.
features: Rigid crossbeam design to prevent alignment errors
Variable frequency drive (VFD) for adjustable blade speeds
Touchscreen Human-Machine Interface (HMI) for operation monitoring
Rust-resistant coated components for wet environments

name: 8 Feet Pillar Block Cutter Machine
description: Our flagship block cutter featuring massive 8-foot structural capacity, a high-torque 30 HP motor, and advanced hydraulic horizontal cutting systems. Engineered to handle the hardest granite blocks with effortless precision.
features: Hydraulic power unit for high-speed cutting feed
Laser line guide alignment system for perfect cut accuracy
Dual vertical pillars with chrome-plated finish to resist wear
Automatic block-end sensor to stop operation upon completion

name: Stone CNC Router Machine, 3 Axis
description: A high-precision 3-axis CNC router built specifically for stone fabrication. Features a heavy-duty water cooling system for the spindle and a fully welded steel gantry to maintain accuracy under heavy stone load.

specifications.Transmission: X/Y Axis Helical Rack & Pinion, Z Axis Ball Screw

features: T-slot aluminum table with protective PVC layer and water tank
Double water cooling nozzles for tool longevity
Dustproof and waterproof design on all axes to protect guides
Resume print memory function after power failure

name: CNC Stone Engraving Machine
description: A specialized engraving setup optimal for lettering, drawing, and shallow engraving on stones like marble, granite, tiles, and slate. Combines affordability with heavy-duty construction.
features: High accuracy square guide rails
Heavy load bearing frame structure with rust prevention painting
DSP handheld controller for offline operations
Compatible with Type3, Artcam, and JDpaint software

name: CNC Router Machine
description: A versatile CNC router capable of processing wood, MDF, acrylics, soft metals, and stone. Features a hybrid vacuum table and t-slot design, making it the perfect multi-utility machine for mixed fabrication workshops.
features: Vaccum pump suction for easy wood/acrylic clamping
Auxiliary T-slots for mechanical clamping of heavy stone pieces
Highly responsive limit switches on all axes for safety
Automatic tool sensor calibrator included

name: Stone CNC Carving Machine
description: An advanced CNC machine optimized for high-depth 3D carvings, sculpture works, and pillar designs. Comes with optional rotary axes for machining cylinders and pillars.
features: High clearance Z-axis for thick block processing
Optional heavy-duty rotary axis for carving pillar statues
Cast steel structure frame for heavy duty shock absorption
Industrial water cooling system with digital temp display

name: Double Girder EOT Cranes, Span: 20 m
description: Heavy-duty overhead crane featuring a double girder design for high load capacities and long spans. Ideal for heavy machinery handling, factories, steel mills, and heavy stone yards where safe and smooth lifting is critical.

specifications.Duty Class: Class II / Class III (M5 / M6 IS-807)
specifications.Control: Cabin control or wireless radio remote control

features: Double beam box-type girders with computerized deflection analysis
Low headroom design for maximum space utilization under roof
Variable frequency drives (VFD) for micro-speeds and smooth hoisting
Full-length platforms with handrails on both sides of girders for maintenance access
applications: Heavy block lifting in stone cutting yards

name: Single Girder EOT Cranes, Span: 10 m
description: Cost-effective, highly efficient, and light-weight crane system for smaller factories and workshops. The single girder design provides compact headroom while delivering exceptional stability.

specifications.Control: Pendant control switch or wireless remote

features: Optimized structural design for minimal wheel load on factory gantry
Compact wire rope hoist for maximized hook approaches
Thermal overload protection for hoist motors
Anti-fall safety locks on end carriages
applications: Machine shop maintenance and tooling setup

name: Double Beam Gantry Crane, 20 m, 30 Ton
description: Self-supporting outdoor gantry crane designed for stone processing yards, ports, and construction sites. Eliminates the need for overhead building runways, operating directly on floor-level rails.
features: Wind speed alarm sensor for outdoor operation safety
Heavy-duty long-travel motors with electro-hydraulic thruster brakes
Walkway platforms on legs and beams for safe inspections
Rain protection covers for hoisting trolley and motor
applications: Unloading raw blocks from transport trucks

name: Overhead Crane
description: Custom-designed factory overhead crane system built to fit specific workspace constraints. Built in compliance with international lifting standards, optimizing load handling and workspace footprint.
features: Tailor-made to fit low ceilings or obstruction-heavy warehouses
Precision step-less acceleration for fragile loads
Fail-safe electro-magnetic brakes on hoist and travel
LED load weight display screen on girder (optional)
